[[File:Granite maul (Last Man Standing) detail.png|left|120px]]
The '''granite maul''' from [[Last Man Standing]] is a minigame-exclusive variant of the normal [[granite maul]]. It can be obtained  from opening the [[Chest (Last Man Standing)|chests]] with a [[bloody key]] or [[bloodier key]], or looting the [[Crate (Last Man Standing)|crates]] that spawn at random locations on the map. It is dropped on death to whoever killed you.

==Special attack==
[[File:Quick Smash.gif|thumb|250px|A player performing the granite maul's special attack, ''Quick Smash''.]]
The granite maul's [[special attack]], ''Quick Smash'', deals an instant attack. Unlike the normal variant of the granite maul outside Last Man Standing, it consumes 50% of the player's special attack energy instead of 60%.

If the three hits are timed correctly, the granite maul can kill instantly. However, one drawback is that unlike most special attacks, ''Quick Smash'' does not increase accuracy.

'''Note:''' Initiating [[combat]] with the granite maul's special attack is wasteful as the player character will not deal an instant hit afterwards, with the regular delay occurring instead.
